title: Arthur J. Gallagher: Expecting A Strong FY23
text: Management believes that the current favorable P&C conditions will persist throughout the year. Brokerage is expected to grow organically by 7% to 9% in 2023, with risk management growing 10%, and management has maintained margin guidance.
